category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes texlab as an implementation of LSP for LaTeX.
source_facts.description says texlab implements the Language Server Protocol for LaTeX.
docs_sources: Official GitHub wiki provides texlab documentation including configuration.
source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository, whose README is the project documentation fallback.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/latex-lsp/texlab; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official wiki configuration page documents LSP client settings for texlab.
source_facts.description identifies Language Server Protocol support for LaTeX.
